reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y descuentos con la tarjeta de beneficios. Siempre tienen repuestos de limpiaparabrisas para renovar. No te apuran. A veces las filas de autos pueden demorar en horarios picos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and discounts with the loyalty card. They always have replacement windshield wiper blades. They don't rush you. Sometimes the lines of cars can be slow during peak hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQybC1tTXNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésimo, querés cargar nafta en la noche, son como 3 playeros y 1 solo surtidor habilitado, estuve esperando 1/2 hora para ser atendido. Encima te miran y no son capaces de habilitar otra isla😤🤬🤬

(Translated by Google)
Terrible. If you want to fill up at night, there are like 3 gas pumps and only one pump open. I waited half an hour to be served. On top of that, they look at you and aren't able to open another pump.
